description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical coffee machine with a transparent body that reveals a chamber filled with dark coffee beans. The machine features a wide, flat, light-colored lid that fits snugly on top, giving it a modern and minimalistic appearance. The transparent container allows for easy monitoring of the coffee bean level inside. The overall design is sleek and simple, with no visible buttons, spouts, or control panels on the exterior. The coffee machine appears to be made primarily of clear plastic or glass for the body and a matte plastic or metal for the lid. There are no visible brand markings, control elements, or additional attachments such as a portafilter or steam wand.
description: A modern, cylindrical coffee machine with a transparent body filled with coffee beans and a flat, light-colored lid. The design is minimalistic with no visible controls or attachments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent chamber filled with coffee beans and the flat, light-colored lid.
description_view_1: Side view with a clear look at the coffee beans inside and the smooth, continuous surface of the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the transparent body and coffee beans visible, no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the transparent chamber and lid, with no visible controls or attachments.
